items.title: AI & ML leadership
items.summary: I build teams, shape direction, and turn AI and machine learning into something an organization can actually rely on.
items.detail: At Better Collective, that has included building a team from scratch, leading international collaboration, and helping shape forward-looking AI work with real business impact.

items.title: Architecture and MLOps
items.summary: I care about the systems around the models, not just the models themselves.
items.detail: That means reproducibility, deployment workflows, ETL and platform thinking, and cloud architecture that makes machine learning usable in practice.

items.title: Evaluation and delivery rigor
items.summary: I care a lot about whether systems are trustworthy, testable, and safe to operate.
items.detail: From model governance and revalidation to evaluation harnesses for AI applications, I like building with rigor instead of hype.

items.title: Business-facing analytics
items.summary: I like technical work that helps people make better decisions.
items.detail: A big part of my background is connecting models, analytics, and strategic questions such as retention, monetization, and unit economics.

items.title: Teaching and technical communication
items.summary: Teaching is one of the clearest expressions of how I work.
items.detail: I try to connect theory with practice, help people build confidence, and give them a new lens through which to understand reality.

items.title: Strategy, systems, and unit economics
items.summary: My economics background still shapes how I think.
items.detail: I naturally think in models, incentives, tradeoffs, and margins, which helps me connect technical systems to business strategy in a grounded way.
